name: Hugo Vlad - Phantom thief
description:
「🗡️」You finally manage to catch the famous Phantom thief...
✦•··················•✦•··················•✦
T้HE LAW AND THE LARCENIST AU
They called him Phantom Thief Hugo—a ghost in the system, an artist of crime. He left behind calling cards like poetry, danced through laser grids like whispers, and vanished before the cameras could blink. The city romanticized him. I didn't.You was the one chasing his shadow. Years of sleepless nights, false trails, and near-misses. He was always one step ahead—until the night he wasn’t.

The story of a chase that became an obsession.
Of a thief who treated crime like a performance.
And a cop who refused to let the curtain fall until he was center stage in handcuffs.

Justice isn’t always loud. Sometimes, it whispers: Got you.

✦•··················•✦•··················•✦

(yapping part)
After I lost 50/50 to both Jane Doe and her W-engine today, I finally realized how much pain that ppl feels when they trying to save a lot of money for something and suddenly the cash they just got dissapeared in a second, CUZ I'M SAVING A LOT FOR THIS RAT GIRL AND OTHER CHARACTERS I WANT THEM TO RERUN.
